{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Laravel Developer",
  "description": "Goodnews Consulting is an Human Resource Consulting firm which provides recruitment and outsourcing services to clients ensuring they have a suitable workforce that works to achieve the goal of the employer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Laravel Developer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Mode: Hybrid work model (2 days onsite)

About the Role


	We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with strong experience in PHP (Laravel) to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building, maintaining, and improving web applications that deliver excellent user experiences and robust backend performance.
	This is a six months contract base role with possibilities of renewal and conversion depending on performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable web applications using Laravel framework.
	Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and other external services.
	Build and enhance responsive front-end interfaces with modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js or React).
	Manage database structures, migrations, and optimization
	Architect and implement scalable solutions, ensuring optimal performance and maintainability.
	Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
	Maintain and refactor existing codebases to improve performance and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade systems when necessary.
	Lead code reviews, enforce coding standards, and ensure adherence to best practices.
	Conduct technical feasibility assessments for new product features and improvements.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and proactively recommend improvements to enhance product scalability and user experience.
	Participate in technical decision-making and contribute to the overall product roadmap from a development perspective


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
	Minimum of 2 proven years of professional experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap/Tailwind CSS.
	Experience with Vue.js or React.js frameworks.
	Good understanding of software architecture, security practices, and deployment pipelines.
	Knowledge of unit testing
	Familiarity with cloud services (AWS, DigitalOcean, or similar) and containerization (Docker) is a plus.
	Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and web security best practices.
	Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and make sound technical decisions in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and link to their portfolio to: humanresources@bullionsms.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-07",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Laravel Developer Job at Goodnews Consulting




        
    

        
        Goodnews Consulting is an Human Resource Consulting firm which provides recruitment and outsourcing services to clients ensuring they have a suitable workforce that works to achieve the goal of the employer.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Laravel Developer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract
Job Mode: Hybrid work model (2 days onsite)

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a skilled Full Stack Developer with strong experience in PHP (Laravel) to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building, maintaining, and improving web applications that deliver excellent user experiences and robust backend performance.
	This is a six months contract base role with possibilities of renewal and conversion depending on performance.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, test, and deploy scalable web applications using Laravel framework.
	Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and other external services.
	Build and enhance responsive front-end interfaces with modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js or React).
	Manage database structures, migrations, and optimization
	Architect and implement scalable solutions, ensuring optimal performance and maintainability.
	Collaborate with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver seamless user experiences.
	Maintain and refactor existing codebases to improve performance and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade systems when necessary.
	Lead code reviews, enforce coding standards, and ensure adherence to best practices.
	Conduct technical feasibility assessments for new product features and improvements.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and proactively recommend improvements to enhance product scalability and user experience.
	Participate in technical decision-making and contribute to the overall product roadmap from a development perspective


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
	Minimum of 2 proven years of professional experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap/Tailwind CSS.
	Experience with Vue.js or React.js frameworks.
	Good understanding of software architecture, security practices, and deployment pipelines.
	Knowledge of unit testing
	Familiarity with cloud services (AWS, DigitalOcean, or similar) and containerization (Docker) is a plus.
	Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and web security best practices.
	Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and make sound technical decisions in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and link to their portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Driver",
  "description": "Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited is a Leading Lifestyle brand, essentially created to provide great quality products, from luxury wristwatches, bags, make-up, sneakers, home and electronic appliances, at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Driver

Job Location: VI (Akin Adeshola), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a reliable, professional, and safety-conscious Driver to provide transportation services for company personnel, executives, and official assignments.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring timely transportation, maintaining the assigned vehicle in excellent condition, and adhering to all traffic regulations and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport company staff, executives, clients, and visitors to designated locations.
	Ensure timely pick-up and drop-off according to assigned schedules.
	Maintain the cleanliness and overall condition of the assigned vehicle.
	Conduct routine vehicle inspections and report any faults, damages, or maintenance needs promptly.
	Monitor fuel levels and ensure the vehicle is adequately fueled at all times.
	Keep accurate records of trips, mileage, fuel consumption, and maintenance activities.
	Adhere to all traffic laws, road safety regulations, and company driving policies.
	Assist with the delivery and collection of documents, parcels, and other company items when required.
	Plan efficient routes to avoid delays and ensure timely arrival at destinations.
	Maintain confidentiality regarding company information and executive movements.
	Support other administrative or logistics-related duties as assigned.


Requirements
Education:


	Minimum of Secondary School Certificate (SSCE) or equivalent.


Experience:


	2 - 5 years of proven driving experience in a corporate, executive, or similar environment.


Skills and Competencies:


	Valid driver&#39;s license with a clean driving record.
	Good knowledge of road networks and traffic regulations.
	Strong sense of responsibility, integrity, and professionalism.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
	Ability to remain calm and courteous under pressure.
	Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Defensive driving certification is an added advantage.
	Experience driving senior executives or management personnel.
	Familiarity with GPS navigation systems and route planning.


Working Conditions:


	May require occasional overtime, weekend work, or travel depending on business needs.
	Must be physically fit and able to sit for extended periods while driving.


Compensation and Benefits


	Competitive salary (N120,000 - N150,000 monthly)
	Health and welfare benefits (where applicable).
	Opportunities for professional development.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: mailseyi247@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Equal opportunity is given to all qualified candidates.
	Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

Executive Driver Job at Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited is a Leading Lifestyle brand, essentially created to provide great quality products, from luxury wristwatches, bags, make-up, sneakers, home and electronic appliances, at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Driver

Job Location: VI (Akin Adeshola), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a reliable, professional, and safety-conscious Driver to provide transportation services for company personnel, executives, and official assignments.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring timely transportation, maintaining the assigned vehicle in excellent condition, and adhering to all traffic regulations and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport company staff, executives, clients, and visitors to designated locations.
	Ensure timely pick-up and drop-off according to assigned schedules.
	Maintain the cleanliness and overall condition of the assigned vehicle.
	Conduct routine vehicle inspections and report any faults, damages, or maintenance needs promptly.
	Monitor fuel levels and ensure the vehicle is adequately fueled at all times.
	Keep accurate records of trips, mileage, fuel consumption, and maintenance activities.
	Adhere to all traffic laws, road safety regulations, and company driving policies.
	Assist with the delivery and collection of documents, parcels, and other company items when required.
	Plan efficient routes to avoid delays and ensure timely arrival at destinations.
	Maintain confidentiality regarding company information and executive movements.
	Support other administrative or logistics-related duties as assigned.


Requirements
Education:


	Minimum of Secondary School Certificate (SSCE) or equivalent.


Experience:


	2 - 5 years of proven driving experience in a corporate, executive, or similar environment.


Skills and Competencies:


	Valid driver's license with a clean driving record.
	Good knowledge of road networks and traffic regulations.
	Strong sense of responsibility, integrity, and professionalism.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
	Ability to remain calm and courteous under pressure.
	Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Defensive driving certification is an added advantage.
	Experience driving senior executives or management personnel.
	Familiarity with GPS navigation systems and route planning.


Working Conditions:


	May require occasional overtime, weekend work, or travel depending on business needs.
	Must be physically fit and able to sit for extended periods while driving.


Compensation and Benefits


	Competitive salary (N120,000 - N150,000 monthly)
	Health and welfare benefits (where applicable).
	Opportunities for professional development.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Equal opportunity is given to all qualified candidates.
	Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Construction Manager",
  "description": "SAVGRET Consulting Services is a professional consulting firm focused on delivering cost-effective, high-quality solutions to construction and infrastructure projects. The company supports clients across the project lifecycle, from planning and budgeting to execution and close-out. SAVGRET emphasizes rigorous cost control, transparent reporting, and collaborative partnerships with stakeholders. Team members work in a structured yet dynamic environment that values technical excellence, integrity, and continuous improvement. The company offers opportunities for growth for professionals who are committed to delivering reliable results on complex projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Report to: Project Director / Principal Construction Manager

Job Summary


	The Construction Manager is responsible for planning, coordinating, and supervising construction projects from inception to completion. The role ensures that projects are delivered safely, on schedule, within budget, and in accordance with quality standards, contract specifications, and regulatory requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, organize, and oversee all construction activities on assigned projects.
	Develop and monitor project schedules, budgets, and resource allocation plans.
	Coordinate the activities of engineers, supervisors, subcontractors, suppliers, and site personnel.
	Ensure compliance with project specifications, drawings, and contractual obligations.
	Monitor construction progress and implement corrective actions where necessary.
	Enforce Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) policies and ensure a safe working environment.
	Conduct regular site inspections and quality control assessments.
	Review and approve work programs, method statements, and progress reports.
	Manage project risks and resolve technical and operational challenges.
	Liaise with clients, consultants, regulatory authorities, and other stakeholders.
	Monitor procurement and delivery of construction materials and equipment.
	Prepare periodic project performance reports for management.
	Ensure efficient utilization of manpower, equipment, and project resources.
	Lead project meetings and provide strategic direction to the construction team.
	Support project closeout activities, including snagging, commissioning, and handover.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Project completion within approved schedule.
	Adherence to project budget.
	Quality compliance and reduction of rework.
	HSE performance and incident-free operations.
	Client satisfaction and successful project delivery.
	Efficient resource utilization and productivity improvement.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, Construction Management, Quantity Surveying, or a related field.
	Must have 8&ndash;15 years of relevant construction experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial role.
	Professional certification is an added advantage (e.g., COREN, NSE, PMP, CIOB, NIQS).
	Proven experience managing large-scale building, infrastructure, or industrial projects.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Strong project management and leadership skills.
	Excellent knowledge of construction methods, materials, and industry standards.
	Proficiency in project planning and scheduling software.
	Strong budgeting and cost-control abilities.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Sound knowledge of HSE regulations and quality management systems.
	Problem-solving and decision-making capabilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrbp2@rhemaprojectng.com copying savgretconsulting@gmail.com using &quot;Construction Manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Construction Manager Job at SAVGRET Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        SAVGRET Consulting Services is a professional consulting firm focused on delivering cost-effective, high-quality solutions to construction and infrastructure projects. The company supports clients across the project lifecycle, from planning and budgeting to execution and close-out. SAVGRET emphasizes rigorous cost control, transparent reporting, and collaborative partnerships with stakeholders. Team members work in a structured yet dynamic environment that values technical excellence, integrity, and continuous improvement. The company offers opportunities for growth for professionals who are committed to delivering reliable results on complex projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Report to: Project Director / Principal Construction Manager

Job Summary


	The Construction Manager is responsible for planning, coordinating, and supervising construction projects from inception to completion. The role ensures that projects are delivered safely, on schedule, within budget, and in accordance with quality standards, contract specifications, and regulatory requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, organize, and oversee all construction activities on assigned projects.
	Develop and monitor project schedules, budgets, and resource allocation plans.
	Coordinate the activities of engineers, supervisors, subcontractors, suppliers, and site personnel.
	Ensure compliance with project specifications, drawings, and contractual obligations.
	Monitor construction progress and implement corrective actions where necessary.
	Enforce Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) policies and ensure a safe working environment.
	Conduct regular site inspections and quality control assessments.
	Review and approve work programs, method statements, and progress reports.
	Manage project risks and resolve technical and operational challenges.
	Liaise with clients, consultants, regulatory authorities, and other stakeholders.
	Monitor procurement and delivery of construction materials and equipment.
	Prepare periodic project performance reports for management.
	Ensure efficient utilization of manpower, equipment, and project resources.
	Lead project meetings and provide strategic direction to the construction team.
	Support project closeout activities, including snagging, commissioning, and handover.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Project completion within approved schedule.
	Adherence to project budget.
	Quality compliance and reduction of rework.
	HSE performance and incident-free operations.
	Client satisfaction and successful project delivery.
	Efficient resource utilization and productivity improvement.


Qualifications and Experience


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, Construction Management, Quantity Surveying, or a related field.
	Must have 8–15 years of relevant construction experience, with at least 5 years in a managerial role.
	Professional certification is an added advantage (e.g., COREN, NSE, PMP, CIOB, NIQS).
	Proven experience managing large-scale building, infrastructure, or industrial projects.


Required Skills and Competencies:


	Strong project management and leadership skills.
	Excellent knowledge of construction methods, materials, and industry standards.
	Proficiency in project planning and scheduling software.
	Strong budgeting and cost-control abilities.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Sound knowledge of HSE regulations and quality management systems.
	Problem-solving and decision-making capabilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] copying [email protected] using "Construction Manager" as the subject of the mail.

We also help SME businesses with virtual and technological support. We help large businesses fill the mass talent exit challenge and advise strategies for talent retention to increase productivity and reduce costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, generating leads, building client relationships, and driving revenue growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities.
	Generate and convert leads into clients.
	Develop and maintain strong client relationships.
	Prepare and deliver sales presentations and proposals.
	Meet assigned sales and revenue targets.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis.
	Provide regular business development reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in service sales or business development.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Proven ability to achieve sales targets.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and digital communication tools.
	Bachelor&#39;s degree in a relevant field is an advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.",

Business Development Officer Job at JSK Consulting Group




        
    

        
        JSK Consulting Group is a leading Performance, Business Support and HR Consultancy, specializing in people transformation, development, and growth. We provide end-to-end support to our numerous clients that helps them control the current tide of growth leadership, manage disruption and build a sustainable business. We also help SME businesses with virtual and technological support. We help large businesses fill the mass talent exit challenge and advise strategies for talent retention to increase productivity and reduce costs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, generating leads, building client relationships, and driving revenue growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities.
	Generate and convert leads into clients.
	Develop and maintain strong client relationships.
	Prepare and deliver sales presentations and proposals.
	Meet assigned sales and revenue targets.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis.
	Provide regular business development reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in service sales or business development.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Proven ability to achieve sales targets.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and digital communication tools.
	Bachelor's degree in a relevant field is an advantage.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.    

    

        Click here to Apply
